zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells於大約1239年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Baron Roger de Burnell34歲，母親Mrs. Roger de Burnell33歲。他與Juliana結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年在英國諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells于大约1239年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Baron Roger de Burnell34岁，母亲Mrs. Roger de Burnell33岁。他与Juliana结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1292年在英国諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Burnel, a metathesized form of Old French Brunel, originally a nickname for someone with brown hair or complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells was born about 1239, in Shropshire, England, his father, Baron Roger de Burnell, was 34 and his mother, Mrs. Roger de Burnell, was 33. He married Juliana. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1292, in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells est né environ 1239, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Baron Roger de Burnell, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Roger de Burnell, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Juliana. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1292, à Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells um 1239 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Roger de Burnell 34 und seine Mutter Mrs. Roger de Burnell 33. Er hat Juliana geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1292 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells è nato il circa 1239 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Baron Roger de Burnell, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Roger de Burnell, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Juliana. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1292, nel Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wellsが約1239年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Baron Roger de Burnellは34歳，母Mrs. Roger de Burnellは33歳であった。Julianaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1292年にイギリスノースウンバーランドバーウィク-ウプオン-トウィードで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells(이)가 대략 1239년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Roger de Burnell(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Roger de Burnell(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Juliana(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 영국 노르스벌랜드 버윅-업-트위드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells nasceu aproximadamente 1239, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron Roger de Burnell, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Roger de Burnell, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1292, em Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells родился около 1239 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron Roger de Burnell было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Roger de Burnell, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1292 г. в местности бирвикк-упон-твид, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells nació aproximadamente 1239, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron Roger de Burnell, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mrs. Roger de Burnell, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Juliana. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1292, en Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
